title: Buy a Transit Ticket
summary: Purchase a single transit ticket using a machine, app, or cash fare.
learnerPromise: You will be able to buy a single transit ticket on your own using a ticket machine, mobile app, or cash payment.
whyItMatters: Knowing how to buy a ticket removes stress when using public transit. It helps you board quickly and avoid holding up the line or getting a fine.
realLifeUses: Buying a single-ride ticket at a train station kiosk before a trip
Using a transit app to purchase a digital bus pass
Paying cash fare when you board a bus that accepts it
Getting a ticket for a friend who is traveling with you
materialsNeeded: A transit ticket machine, transit app, or exact cash fare
A payment method (cash, card, or phone)
result: You hold a valid transit ticket or pass ready to use.
youWillLearn: How to select the right ticket type for your trip
How to use a ticket machine step by step
How to buy and activate a ticket in a transit app
How to keep your ticket ready for boarding or inspection
miniChallenge: Buy a single-ride transit ticket using a machine or app. Show the ticket or confirmation screen to a helper and explain what you chose and why.
steps: Check the fare options and pick the ticket type that fits your trip (single ride, round trip, etc.).
Select your payment method: insert cash, tap a card, or confirm in-app payment.
Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the purchase.
Take your ticket or save the digital pass to your phone.
Keep the ticket visible or easily accessible for boarding or fare inspection.
completionCriteria: You selected the correct ticket type for a single trip
You completed the purchase and received a ticket or digital confirmation
commonProblems: Ticket machines may not accept certain bills or cards
Apps sometimes require account setup before first purchase
It is easy to accidentally buy the wrong fare zone or ticket type
tips: Have your payment method ready before you approach the machine
If paying cash on a bus, carry exact change when possible
Screenshot your digital ticket in case your app loses connection
